title: Trump kept out of war room, 'screamed at aides': What happened after US jet was shot down in Iran
summary_full: A US jet downed over Iran caused turmoil in the White House. President Donald Trump pushed for immediate rescue of two missing airmen. Officials planned a complex mission to retrieve them from Iranian territory. One airman was quickly recovered. The second was rescued after over 24 hours behind enemy lines. This averted a major setback for the administration.
